economic_notes: First Nation has investments in Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe Limited Partnership (14%), Centre Creek Limited Partnership (11%), Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society (11%), and wholly-owned Soowahlie Economic Development LP. Equity earnings from investments totalled $256,665.
notes: Audit is qualified due to absence of budget comparison information, not a going concern issue. Fiscal year is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). First Nations Health Authority ($767,555) and CMHC ($31,510) included in total government transfers alongside ISC ($3,829,608) totalling $4,628,763. Soowahlie Economic Development GP Ltd and LP are 100%/99.99% owned GBEs accounted for by modified equity method with nil earnings. Tangible capital assets net book value per Schedule 1: $7,545,227. Salaries from segmented schedule: $1,554,354. Deferred revenue end balance $135,288. Long-term debt includes new All Nations Trust mortgage of $1,114,915 advanced in year.
